---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Elena Nilsen"
date: "2026-02-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
setwd("/Users/Elena/Documents/lilium_project/")
```


```{bash}
# mafft data/sequence.fasta > alignment/lilium_aln.fasta
```
